heroRoles: I help businesses grow through modern web, mobile, and digital solutions
site.heroBio:
From idea to launch, I create fast, scalable, and user-friendly digital solutions that help businesses improve their online presence and grow efficiently.
With 4+ years of experience, I’ve helped businesses grow through modern, scalable, and high-performing digital solutions.

about.body_paragraph1: I build software that solves real problems. As a Software Engineer at Vistaar Digital, I lead end-to-end delivery for agency and startup clients owning everything from database design to cloud deployment and client communication.
about.body_paragraph2: What sets me apart is the range. Web, mobile, server infrastructure, and AI I handle every layer without handing off. Outside my full-time role, I have delivered 10+ freelance projects through referrals alone, helping small businesses move from paper-based operations to fully digital systems.
about.body_closing: If you need an engineer who takes full ownership let's talk.

values.title: Full ownership
values.description: I own the entire lifecycle architecture, development, deployment, and delivery.

values.title: Outcome focused
values.description: I speak to clients in results, not technical jargon.

values.title: Referral built
values.description: Every freelance client came through a recommendation no platforms, no pitching.

contact.intro: Have a web platform, mobile application, or digital solution in mind? Send a short message with your requirements and timeline, and I'll get back to you within a couple of business days.

footer.blurb: Helping businesses grow with modern web, mobile, and AI-driven digital solutions. Building fast, scalable, and user-friendly experiences that drive real results.

testimonials.text: Manish built a very robust real estate board package platform for our operations. The custom conditional forms and secure payment systems work flawlessly, and his security audit saved us from critical vulnerabilities.
Outstanding work on our logistics website. Manish built a fully responsive, lightweight static site with integrated WhatsApp options that makes it easy for our local cargo clients to reach us.

Our D2C nutraceutical Shopify store has been a huge success. The pharmacist founding story, the vitamin D3/K2 comparison tables, and custom checkout flows have driven exceptional conversions across India.
Managing energy data dashboards across 8 South Asian countries is complex due to varying calendar styles. Manish structured the database and interactive charts perfectly on WordPress.

The India Climate and Energy Dashboard is highly detailed, tracking NDC goals and GIS map layers. Manish delivered high-performance visual tools on government infrastructure. Very impressive engineering.

faqs.q: Are you available for freelance work?
faqs.a: Yes. I take on well-scoped freelance projects, including custom websites, CMS platforms, mobile apps, and e-commerce builds. Share your requirements and timeline through the contact form, and I will get back to you promptly.

faqs.q: Have you led or mentored other developers?
faqs.a: Yes. At Vistaar Digital, I interview candidate developers, mentor new hires, and onboard team members. I also manage client accounts directly, bridging technical delivery and business communication.

faqs.q: Do you work with small businesses?
faqs.a: Yes, and it is some of my most rewarding work. Several of my freelance clients were managing their business operations entirely on paper. I built them digital systems, including custom CMS dashboards, inventory tools, and mobile apps, that replaced those workflows completely.

faqs.q: What kind of projects do you work on?
faqs.a: Full-stack web applications, mobile apps, e-commerce storefronts, custom CMS platforms, REST APIs, and cloud deployments. From agency-scale products to small business platforms, I have delivered over 25 projects.

faqs.q: Do you handle deployment and hosting as well?
faqs.a: Yes. I configure servers, setup cloud infrastructure on AWS/Heroku, manage SSL and domain configurations, and handle production deployment. You receive a fully live, turn-key product rather than just a repository of code.

faqs.q: How do you manage client projects?
faqs.a: I operate in sprint-like cycles with clear milestones and weekly progress updates. You will always know what has been built, what is scheduled next, and what feedback or decisions are needed. No surprises on scope, budget, or timelines.
